steps_today.hi: Aaj aapne **{steps_today}** steps liye. Weekly average: **{steps_weekly}**. Daily target set karna hai: **{daily_target}**?
steps_today.en: You walked **{steps_today}** steps today. Weekly avg: **{steps_weekly}**. Set daily target **{daily_target}**?

sleep_summary.hi: Last night total **{last_night}**. Deep: **{deep_sleep}h**, Light: **{light_sleep}h**, REM: **{rem_sleep}h**. Tip: **{advice}**.
sleep_summary.en: Last night: **{last_night}** total. Deep: **{deep_sleep}h**, Light: **{light_sleep}h**, REM: **{rem_sleep}h**. Tip: **{advice}**.

sleep_score.en: Your sleep score is **{sleep_score}** — _{interpretation}_. Quick tip: **{quick_tip}**.

hr_current.hi: Current HR **{hr_current}** BPM. Resting **{hr_rest}** BPM. Daily avg **{hr_avg}**. {hr_note}
hr_current.en: Current HR **{hr_current}** BPM. Resting **{hr_rest}** BPM. Daily avg **{hr_avg}**. {hr_note}

water.hi: Aaj aapne **{water_today}** L piya. Recommended **{water_goal}** L. Next reminder: **{next_reminder}**.
water.en: You drank **{water_today}** L today. Recommended **{water_goal}** L. Next reminder at **{next_reminder}**.

weight.hi: Current weight **{weight_current}** kg. Goal **{weight_goal}** kg. Trend: **{weight_trend}** ({period}).
weight.en: Current weight **{weight_current}** kg. Goal **{weight_goal}** kg. Trend: **{weight_trend}** ({period}).

report_generate.hi: Weekly report: Steps **{steps_weekly}**, Calories **{cal_weekly}**, Weight change **{weight_change}**. Generate karun?
report_generate.en: Weekly report: Steps **{steps_weekly}**, Calories **{cal_weekly}**, Weight change **{weight_change}**. Generate now?

fallback_missing.hi: Mujhe abhi woh data nahi mil raha. Kya main recent synced data se check karun?
fallback_missing.en: I don't have that data right now. Shall I check synced data?

abnormal_warning.hi: Ye value thodi unusual lag rahi hai. Agar aapko lagta hai kuch galat hai to doctor se consult karein.
abnormal_warning.en: This value looks a bit unusual. If you feel something's wrong, consult a doctor.
